title: stapelia hirsuta var. longirostris
intro: Stapelia hirsuta var. longirostris, also known as the long-nosed carrion flower or long-nosed stapelia, is a succulent plant species in the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits, including wound healing, pain relief, and immune system support. Stapelia hirsuta var. longirostris can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
